The '''brown folk''', or '''tan folk''', were a [[Kentra]] subspecies with brown fur who lived in the lowland hills on the borders between the mountain ranges and plains of [[Orellon II]]. They were primarily farmers and constituted the second largest farming community of the Kentra.<ref name="TP" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|2|The Prophecy}}
